name: Italian Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (EXCEPT RAISINS) into the inner pan in the order listed, select white bread and push "Start."
2. Add raisins when the Auto Bakery "beeps," 88 minutes into the cycle. This process takes approximately 33 minutes with a DAK Turbo II.
3. Enjoy this exotically flavored high-rising raisin-nut bread, which is uniquely "world class" and definitely irresistible. Shared by Barb Day
